pages.title: A thicker vintage
pages.text: $(item)Refined Life Essence$() is the Arsenal's own fluid — a concentrated, ritual-grade form of the $(l:bloodmagic:altar)Life Essence$() your altar produces. Where raw LP lives inside the network as an abstract pool, refined essence is a carriable, placeable fluid.

pages.title: Refined Life Essence Bucket
pages.text: Fill from a source block of the refined fluid. Empties into a cauldron or the world as expected. Used as a crafting component in the higher-tier recipes — anywhere a bare LP draw won't do.$(br2)Pouring it into a cauldron fills the cauldron with the fluid; dipping an empty bucket back into the cauldron retrieves a single bucket's worth.
